scenarios.title: Hurricane Ingrid — Category 3 — Florida landfall in 48h
scenarios.details: NHC projects landfall near Tampa Bay 2026-05-08. Storm surge 8–12 ft. Mandatory evacuations announced for 4 coastal counties. Power outages expected up to 5 days inland.

scenarios.title: Port of Long Beach — 5-day labor stoppage announced
scenarios.details: ILWU local has filed a 5-day work stoppage starting 2026-05-09. Approximately 38 vessels currently anchored. 2,400 RCG containers in transit. Expected $4.2M backlog impact across network.

scenarios.title: Prairie Farms Dairy — Plant contamination shutdown
scenarios.details: Prairie Farms reported listeria detection at Dubuque facility. FDA mandated 7-day production halt starting 2026-05-05. Affects ~28% of our Midwest dairy supply.

scenarios.title: POS vendor security incident — read-only mode advised
scenarios.details: Vendor advisory: confirmed unauthorized access to POS update server. No customer data exposed. Recommended: pause auto-updates, run integrity scan, communicate to associates.
